notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Calvin Faucher on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja grounds into a double play, third baseman Royce Lewis to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Victor Caratini. Owen Caissie out at 2nd. Javier Sanoja out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Esteury Ruiz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Esteury Ruiz flies out to left fielder James Outman.
